subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! O my Lord! Behold how the faces of Thy loved ones are radiant with Thy bounties, resplendent with the light of Thy love, and illumined by the rays of Thy knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ربی ربی تری وجوه احبائک مستبشره بالطافک ناضره بلوائح حبک منیره بشعاع معرفتک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for gatherings; meetings; assemblies, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @service to others; to the Cause of God
